Project Mirage 開發了一款名為 Dune 的設備，這是一個三鍵鋁製鍵盤，能夠連接到 MacBook 的 USB-C 端口。它的零售價格為 119 美元，旨在控制各種應用程序，根據當前活動的應用程序改變功能。該設備與 M2 Air 或更高版本以及 M1 Pro 或更高版本的 MacBook 型號兼容，運行 macOS 15 Sequoia 或更高版本。Dune 包含一個伴隨應用程序，用於配置快捷鍵和與日曆同步。用戶可以創建自定義快捷鍵或使用市場上現有的快捷鍵。該設備不需要電池，並從 MacBook 獲取電源。

summaries.en:
Title: The Dune keypad device can be your meeting controller and more
Neutral:
Project Mirage has developed a device called Dune, a three-key aluminum keypad that connects to MacBook USB-C ports. It retails for $119 and is designed to control various applications, changing functions based on the active app. The device is compatible with M2 Air or later and M1 Pro or later MacBook models running macOS 15 Sequoia or later. Dune includes a companion app for configuring shortcuts and syncing with calendars. Users can create custom shortcuts or use pre-existing ones from a marketplace. The device does not require a battery and draws power from the MacBook.

中立：
三家核能初創公司，Valar Atomics、Antares Nuclear 和 Deployable Energy，在能源部啟動的試點計劃中實現了其反應堆的臨界性。該計劃旨在推進新核反應堆設計的發展。建立該計劃的行政命令由唐納德·特朗普總統於2025年5月頒布，臨界性達成的截止日期定於7月4日。這些反應堆在全國實驗室進行測試，包括洛斯阿拉莫斯國家實驗室和猶他州的一個州資助實驗室。這些初創公司正在與核能監管委員會協調，為未來的商業化進程導航。

summaries.en:
Title: 3 Nuclear Startups Hit a Big Milestone. Why It Matters—and Why It Doesn’t
Neutral:
Three nuclear startups, Valar Atomics, Antares Nuclear, and Deployable Energy, achieved criticality in their reactors as part of a pilot program initiated by the Department of Energy. This program aims to advance the development of new nuclear reactor designs. The executive order establishing the program was issued by President Donald Trump in May 2025, with a deadline for reaching criticality set for July 4. The reactors were tested at national laboratories, including Los Alamos National Laboratory and a state-funded lab in Utah. The startups are working to navigate regulatory processes with the Nuclear Regulatory Commission for future commercialization.

Reports indicate that Polish infrastructure could be targeted by missiles or drones. NATO's Article 5 stipulates that an armed attack against one member is considered an attack against all members. Lithuania's ambassador to NATO noted that Russia may use hybrid warfare tactics.

summaries.en:
Title: When the Law Kills Your Electric Car Dealership
Neutral:
Polestar Short Hills, an electric vehicle dealership in northern New Jersey, opened in 2021. The dealership has experienced fluctuations in sales due to changes in federal tax credits and other market factors. Polestar announced that the US Commerce Department denied authorization for the brand to sell cars in the US due to a federal rule on Chinese-made connected-vehicle technology. As a result, Polestar will stop selling vehicles in the US starting with the 2027 model year. Volvo received authorization from the Commerce Department in March 2023. Polestar stated that US dealerships would sell existing stock and continue to support customers through a service network.
